# Awesome NestJS Curated Links

This shortlist is derived from https://github.com/nestjs/awesome-nestjs and biased toward production usage.

## Official Foundations

- https://nestjs.com
- https://docs.nestjs.com
- https://github.com/nestjs/nest
- https://github.com/nestjs/typescript-starter

## Architecture and Examples

- DDD example: https://github.com/Sikora00/ddd-by-examples-library-nestjs
- Realworld API: https://github.com/lujakob/nestjs-realworld-example-app
- System design with Nx: https://github.com/CSenshi/system-craft
- Clean architecture sample: https://github.com/pvarentsov/typescript-clean-architecture

## Production Boilerplates

- Clean architecture + tests: https://github.com/VincentJouanne/nest-clean-architecture-ddd-example
- Prisma starter: https://github.com/notiz-dev/nestjs-prisma-starter
- Enterprise starter set: https://github.com/monstar-lab-oss/nestjs-starter-rest-api

## Core Platform Extensions

- CQRS: https://github.com/nestjs/cqrs
- Throttling: https://github.com/nestjs/throttler
- Swagger: https://github.com/nestjs/swagger
- Terminus: https://github.com/nestjs/terminus
- Schedule: https://github.com/nestjs/schedule

## Logging and Observability

- Pino module: https://github.com/iamolegga/nestjs-pino
- Winston module: https://github.com/gremo/nest-winston
- OpenTelemetry: https://github.com/pragmaticivan/nestjs-otel
- Prometheus: https://github.com/willsoto/nestjs-prometheus

## Validation and Contract Tooling

- Zod integration: https://github.com/BenLorantfy/nestjs-zod
- Performance-oriented toolchain: https://github.com/samchon/nestia
- Typia validator: https://github.com/samchon/typia

## Testing References

- Testing patterns collection: https://github.com/jmcdo29/testing-nestjs
- Utilities: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@golevelup/ts-jest
- Pact integration: https://www.npmjs.com/package/nestjs-pact

## Selection Advice

- Prefer official modules first.
- Pick ecosystem libraries with active maintenance and clear migration story.
- Avoid introducing many overlapping libraries for the same concern.
